---
title: "The title of your report"
subtitle: "The subtitle of your report"
author: "your name or email"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
      smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    code_folding: hide
    highlight: tango
---

<style>
/* ── Global palette: dark navy, red, grey ── */
body {
  background-color: #0d1b2a;
  color: #d6dde8;
  font-family: 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: 15px;
}

h1, h2, h3, h4 {
  color: #e8edf4;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #c0392b;
  padding-bottom: 4px;
}

/* Floating TOC */
.tocify {
  background-color: #162032 !important;
  border: 1px solid #c0392b !important;
}
.tocify-header, .tocify-item {
  background-color: #162032 !important;
  color: #aab4c4 !important;
}
.tocify-item.active {
  background-color: #c0392b !important;
  color: #ffffff !important;
}

/* Main content area */
.main-container {
  background-color: #111e2e;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 20px 30px;
}

/* Code chunks */
pre, code {
  background-color: #162032 !important;
  color: #aecbfa !important;
  border: 1px solid #2a3f5a;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

/* Inline code */
p code {
  color: #e06c75 !important;
  background-color: #1e2f45 !important;
}

/* kable / DT tables */
table {
  background-color: #162032 !important;
  color: #d6dde8 !important;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  width: 100%;
}
th {
  background-color: #c0392b !important;
  color: #ffffff !important;
  padding: 8px 12px;
}
td {
  padding: 6px 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #1e3a5a;
}
tr:nth-child(even) { background-color: #1a2c42 !important; }
tr:hover           { background-color: #223348 !important; }

/* gtsummary */
.gt_table {
  background-color: #162032 !important;
  color: #d6dde8 !important;
}
.gt_col_heading {
  background-color: #c0392b !important;
  color: #ffffff !important;
}

/* Callout boxes */
.callout {
  background-color: #162032;
  border-left: 4px solid #c0392b;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  margin: 16px 0;
}

/* Horizontal rule */
hr {
  border-color: #2a3f5a;
  margin: 28px 0;
}

/* Code fold button */
.code-folding-btn {
  background-color: #c0392b !important;
  color: #fff !important;
  border: none !important;
}
</style>

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo      = TRUE,
  warning   = FALSE,
  message   = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center"
)

# ── Palette constants (reused across all plots) ──────────────────────────────
COL_RED   <- "#c0392b"
COL_NAVY  <- "#1a6fa8"
COL_GREY  <- "#7f8c8d"
COL_DARK  <- "#0d1b2a"
PALETTE_4 <- c("#1a6fa8", "#7f8c8d", "#c0392b", "#e8c547")

# ── Auto-install & load packages ─────────────────────────────────────────────
pkgs <- c("NHANES", "tidyverse", "gtsummary", "plotly",
          "broom", "scales", "forcats", "DT")
invisible(lapply(pkgs, function(p) {
  if (!requireNamespace(p, quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages(p, repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
}))

library(NHANES); library(tidyverse); library(gtsummary)
library(plotly);  library(broom);    library(scales)
library(forcats); library(DT)
```

---

# Heading one

## Heading two

### Heading three

*italic text*

**Bold text**


Manual table

| Step | Action |
|------|--------|
| **Age restriction** | Adults aged 20–79 only |
| **De-duplication** | One record per participant (`distinct(ID)`) |
| **Outcome coding** | Diabetes Yes → 1, No → 0 |
| **BMI category** | Underweight / Normal / Overweight / Obese |
| **Age group** | Four bands: 20–39, 40–54, 55–69, 70–79 |
| **Income** | `HHIncomeMid ÷ 1,000` (USD thousands) |
| **Complete-case** | Drop rows with `NA` in any analysis variable |
